content.json:
# Vectra RUX Detection Timeline

Start with any filter — **Detection ID** (click a row or type) or **Entity ID** — and the panels below update to show the full lifecycle of every matching detection.

**Click any row** in the Detection Summary to drill into that single detection. **Change Type** (empty = all types) applies only to the Detection Summary and Full Timeline.

parameters.name: DetectionId
parameters.label: Detection ID
parameters.query:
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| extend det_id = replace_regex(tostring(["Detection ID"]), @"\.0$", "")
| where isnotempty(det_id)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by det_id
| project value=det_id,
          label=strcat(det_id, " — ", tostring(["D Type Vname"]), " on ", tostring(["Entity Name"]))
| order by toint(value) desc

parameters.name: EntityId
parameters.label: Entity ID
parameters.query:
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| extend eid = replace_regex(tostring(["Entity ID"]), @"\.0$", "")
| where isnotempty(eid)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by eid
| project value=eid,
          label=strcat(tostring(["Entity Name"]), " (", tostring(["Entity Type"]), " — ", eid, ")")
| order by label asc

parameters.name: ChangeType
parameters.label: Change Type (empty = all)
parameters.query:
datatable(value: string, label: string)[
    'new',                  'new — Detection created',
    'append',               'append — Evidence added',
    'adjust',               'adjust — Context changed',
    'triage',               'triage — Triaged',
    'investigation_status', 'investigation_status — Status changed',
    'state',                'state — State/close changed'
]

content.query:
let p_DetectionId = tostring("{DetectionId}");
let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");
let DetectionFilterActive = p_DetectionId !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let EntityFilterActive    = p_EntityId    !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let VectraTimeline = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where TimeGenerated between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end})
    | extend
        detection_id       = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("detection_id", column_ifexists("Detection ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        change_type        = tolower(tostring(column_ifexists("change_type", column_ifexists("Change Type", "")))),
        detection_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("d_type_vname", column_ifexists("detection_name", column_ifexists("Detection Name", "")))),
        detection_category = tostring(column_ifexists("category", column_ifexists("Detection Category", ""))),
        entity_name        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_name", column_ifexists("Entity Name", ""))),
        entity_id          = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("entity_id", column_ifexists("Entity ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        entity_type        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_type", column_ifexists("Entity Type", ""))),
        investigation_status = tostring(column_ifexists("investigation_status", column_ifexists("Investigation Status", ""))),
        unresolved_priority  = tostring(column_ifexists("unresolved_priority", column_ifexists("Unresolved Priority", ""))),
        assigned_to        = tostring(column_ifexists("assignment_assigned_to_username", column_ifexists("Assigned To", ""))),
        external_reference = tostring(column_ifexists("external_reference_id", column_ifexists("External Reference ID", ""))),
        tags               = tostring(column_ifexists("tags", column_ifexists("Tags", ""))),
        reason             = tostring(column_ifexists("reason", column_ifexists("Reason", ""))),
        entity_url         = tostring(column_ifexists("url", column_ifexists("entity_url", column_ifexists("URL", "")))),
        detection_href     = tostring(column_ifexists("Vectra Pivot", column_ifexists("detection_href", "")))
,
        src_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("src_host_name",              column_ifexists("Source Host Name", ""))),
        src_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("src_account_name",           column_ifexists("Source Account Name", ""))),
        dst_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_host_name",              column_ifexists("Destination Host Name", ""))),
        dst_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_account_name",           column_ifexists("Destination Account Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_domain",          column_ifexists("Destination Domain Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_external = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_external_target", column_ifexists("Destination Domain External Target", ""))),
        summary             = tostring(column_ifexists("summary",                    column_ifexists("Summary", ""))),
        detail              = tostring(column_ifexists("detail",                     column_ifexists("Details", "")))
    | where not(DetectionFilterActive) or detection_id == p_DetectionId
    | where not(EntityFilterActive)    or entity_id == p_EntityId
};
let _ct    = tostring("{ChangeType}");
let _ctAll = isempty(_ct) or _ct has "<unset>" or _ct has "null";
let _ctNew = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "new")                  >= 0;
let _ctApp = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "append")               >= 0;
let _ctAdj = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "adjust")               >= 0;
let _ctTri = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "triage")               >= 0;
let _ctInv = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "investigation_status") >= 0;
let _ctSt  = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "state")                >= 0;
let Counts =
    VectraTimeline
| where (_ctNew and change_type == "new")
    or  (_ctApp and change_type == "append")
    or  (_ctAdj and change_type == "adjust")
    or  (_ctTri and change_type == "triage")
    or  (_ctInv and change_type == "investigation_status")
    or  (_ctSt  and change_type == "state")
    or  (_ctAll and change_type !in ("new","append","adjust","triage","investigation_status","state"))
    | summarize
        FirstSeen          = min(TimeGenerated),
        LatestUpdate       = max(TimeGenerated),
        TotalEvents        = count(),
        NewEvents          = countif(change_type == "new"),
        AppendEvents       = countif(change_type == "append"),
        AdjustEvents       = countif(change_type == "adjust"),
        CloseEvents        = countif(change_type == "state"),
        LastEvidenceAppend = maxif(TimeGenerated, change_type == "append"),
        LastContextAdjust  = maxif(TimeGenerated, change_type == "adjust")
        by detection_id, entity_id;
let Latest =
    VectraTimeline
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by detection_id, entity_id
    | project detection_id, entity_id,
        DetectionName = detection_name, Category = detection_category,
        EntityName = entity_name, EntityType = entity_type,
        LatestStatus = investigation_status, Priority = unresolved_priority,
        AssignedTo = assigned_to, ExternalRef = external_reference,
        EntityLink = entity_url, DetectionLink = detection_href;
Counts
| join kind=leftouter Latest on detection_id, entity_id
| project detection_id, DetectionName, Category, EntityName, EntityType,
    LatestStatus, Priority, entity_id,
    FirstSeen, LatestUpdate, NewEvents, AppendEvents, AdjustEvents, CloseEvents, TotalEvents,
    LastEvidenceAppend, LastContextAdjust,
    AssignedTo, ExternalRef, EntityLink, DetectionLink
| order by LatestUpdate desc
content.title: Detection Summary — click a row to drill in

content.json: 💡 **Click any row** to filter all panels to that detection. **Change Type** (multi-select, empty = all types) applies only to the two panels above.

content.query:
let p_DetectionId = tostring("{DetectionId}");
let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");
let DetectionFilterActive = p_DetectionId !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let EntityFilterActive    = p_EntityId    !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let VectraTimeline = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where TimeGenerated between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end})
    | extend
        detection_id       = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("detection_id", column_ifexists("Detection ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        change_type        = tolower(tostring(column_ifexists("change_type", column_ifexists("Change Type", "")))),
        detection_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("d_type_vname", column_ifexists("detection_name", column_ifexists("Detection Name", "")))),
        detection_category = tostring(column_ifexists("category", column_ifexists("Detection Category", ""))),
        entity_name        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_name", column_ifexists("Entity Name", ""))),
        entity_id          = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("entity_id", column_ifexists("Entity ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        entity_type        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_type", column_ifexists("Entity Type", ""))),
        investigation_status = tostring(column_ifexists("investigation_status", column_ifexists("Investigation Status", ""))),
        unresolved_priority  = tostring(column_ifexists("unresolved_priority", column_ifexists("Unresolved Priority", ""))),
        assigned_to        = tostring(column_ifexists("assignment_assigned_to_username", column_ifexists("Assigned To", ""))),
        external_reference = tostring(column_ifexists("external_reference_id", column_ifexists("External Reference ID", ""))),
        tags               = tostring(column_ifexists("tags", column_ifexists("Tags", ""))),
        reason             = tostring(column_ifexists("reason", column_ifexists("Reason", ""))),
        entity_url         = tostring(column_ifexists("url", column_ifexists("entity_url", column_ifexists("URL", "")))),
        detection_href     = tostring(column_ifexists("Vectra Pivot", column_ifexists("detection_href", "")))
,
        src_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("src_host_name",              column_ifexists("Source Host Name", ""))),
        src_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("src_account_name",           column_ifexists("Source Account Name", ""))),
        dst_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_host_name",              column_ifexists("Destination Host Name", ""))),
        dst_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_account_name",           column_ifexists("Destination Account Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_domain",          column_ifexists("Destination Domain Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_external = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_external_target", column_ifexists("Destination Domain External Target", ""))),
        summary             = tostring(column_ifexists("summary",                    column_ifexists("Summary", ""))),
        detail              = tostring(column_ifexists("detail",                     column_ifexists("Details", "")))
    | where not(DetectionFilterActive) or detection_id == p_DetectionId
    | where not(EntityFilterActive)    or entity_id == p_EntityId
};
let _ct    = tostring("{ChangeType}");
let _ctAll = isempty(_ct) or _ct has "<unset>" or _ct has "null";
let _ctNew = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "new")                  >= 0;
let _ctApp = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "append")               >= 0;
let _ctAdj = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "adjust")               >= 0;
let _ctTri = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "triage")               >= 0;
let _ctInv = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "investigation_status") >= 0;
let _ctSt  = _ctAll or indexof(_ct, "state")                >= 0;
VectraTimeline
| where (_ctNew and change_type == "new")
    or  (_ctApp and change_type == "append")
    or  (_ctAdj and change_type == "adjust")
    or  (_ctTri and change_type == "triage")
    or  (_ctInv and change_type == "investigation_status")
    or  (_ctSt  and change_type == "state")
    or  (_ctAll and change_type !in ("new","append","adjust","triage","investigation_status","state"))
| project TimeGenerated, change_type, detection_id, detection_name,
    detection_category, entity_name, entity_type, entity_id,
    investigation_status, unresolved_priority, assigned_to,
    external_reference, tags,
    detection_href, entity_url
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Full Detection Lifecycle Timeline — all events, oldest first

let p_DetectionId = tostring("{DetectionId}");
let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");
let DetectionFilterActive = p_DetectionId !in ("", "<unset>", "null");

    union isfuzzy=true VectraDetectionsCombined

        entity_id          = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("entity_id", column_ifexists("Entity ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        entity_type        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_type", column_ifexists("Entity Type", ""))),
        investigation_status = tostring(column_ifexists("investigation_status", column_ifexists("Investigation Status", ""))),
        unresolved_priority  = tostring(column_ifexists("unresolved_priority", column_ifexists("Unresolved Priority", ""))),

        external_reference = tostring(column_ifexists("external_reference_id", column_ifexists("External Reference ID", ""))),
        tags               = tostring(column_ifexists("tags", column_ifexists("Tags", ""))),
        reason             = tostring(column_ifexists("reason", column_ifexists("Reason", ""))),
        entity_url         = tostring(column_ifexists("url", column_ifexists("entity_url", column_ifexists("URL", "")))),
        detection_href     = tostring(column_ifexists("Vectra Pivot", column_ifexists("detection_href", "")))
,
        src_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("src_host_name",              column_ifexists("Source Host Name", ""))),
        src_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("src_account_name",           column_ifexists("Source Account Name", ""))),
        dst_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_host_name",              column_ifexists("Destination Host Name", ""))),
        dst_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_account_name",           column_ifexists("Destination Account Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_domain",          column_ifexists("Destination Domain Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_external = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_external_target", column_ifexists("Destination Domain External Target", ""))),
        summary             = tostring(column_ifexists("summary",                    column_ifexists("Summary", ""))),
        detail              = tostring(column_ifexists("detail",                     column_ifexists("Details", "")))
    | where not(DetectionFilterActive) or detection_id == p_DetectionId
    | where not(EntityFilterActive)    or entity_id == p_EntityId
};
VectraTimeline
| where change_type == "new"
| project TimeGenerated, change_type, detection_id, detection_name,
    detection_category, entity_name, entity_type, entity_id,
    investigation_status, unresolved_priority, assigned_to,
    external_reference, tags,
    src_host_name, src_account_name,
    dst_host_name, dst_account_name,
    dst_domain_name, dst_domain_external,
    summary, detail,
    detection_href, entity_url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: New Detection Information — `change_type = new`

let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");

content.title: Evidence Appends — `change_type = append`

content.title: Context Adjustments — `change_type = adjust`

content.query:
let p_DetectionId = tostring("{DetectionId}");
let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");
let DetectionFilterActive = p_DetectionId !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let EntityFilterActive    = p_EntityId    !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let VectraTimeline = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where TimeGenerated between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end})
    | extend
        detection_id       = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("detection_id", column_ifexists("Detection ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        change_type        = tolower(tostring(column_ifexists("change_type", column_ifexists("Change Type", "")))),
        detection_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("d_type_vname", column_ifexists("detection_name", column_ifexists("Detection Name", "")))),

        entity_id          = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("entity_id", column_ifexists("Entity ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        entity_type        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_type", column_ifexists("Entity Type", ""))),
        investigation_status = tostring(column_ifexists("investigation_status", column_ifexists("Investigation Status", ""))),
        unresolved_priority  = tostring(column_ifexists("unresolved_priority", column_ifexists("Unresolved Priority", ""))),
        assigned_to        = tostring(column_ifexists("assignment_assigned_to_username", column_ifexists("Assigned To", ""))),
        external_reference = tostring(column_ifexists("external_reference_id", column_ifexists("External Reference ID", ""))),
        tags               = tostring(column_ifexists("tags", column_ifexists("Tags", ""))),
        reason             = tostring(column_ifexists("reason", column_ifexists("Reason", ""))),
        entity_url         = tostring(column_ifexists("url", column_ifexists("entity_url", column_ifexists("URL", "")))),
        detection_href     = tostring(column_ifexists("Vectra Pivot", column_ifexists("detection_href", "")))
,
        src_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("src_host_name",              column_ifexists("Source Host Name", ""))),
        src_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("src_account_name",           column_ifexists("Source Account Name", ""))),
        dst_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_host_name",              column_ifexists("Destination Host Name", ""))),
        dst_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_account_name",           column_ifexists("Destination Account Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_domain",          column_ifexists("Destination Domain Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_external = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_external_target", column_ifexists("Destination Domain External Target", ""))),
        summary             = tostring(column_ifexists("summary",                    column_ifexists("Summary", ""))),
        detail              = tostring(column_ifexists("detail",                     column_ifexists("Details", "")))
    | where not(DetectionFilterActive) or detection_id == p_DetectionId
    | where not(EntityFilterActive)    or entity_id == p_EntityId
};
VectraTimeline
| where change_type == "investigation_status"
| project TimeGenerated, change_type, detection_id, detection_name,
    detection_category, entity_name, entity_type, entity_id,
    investigation_status, unresolved_priority, assigned_to,
    external_reference, tags,
    detection_href, entity_url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Investigation Status Updates — `change_type = investigation_status`

content.query:
let p_DetectionId = tostring("{DetectionId}");
let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");
let DetectionFilterActive = p_DetectionId !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let EntityFilterActive    = p_EntityId    !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let VectraTimeline = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where TimeGenerated between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end})
    | extend
        detection_id       = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("detection_id", column_ifexists("Detection ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        change_type        = tolower(tostring(column_ifexists("change_type", column_ifexists("Change Type", "")))),
        detection_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("d_type_vname", column_ifexists("detection_name", column_ifexists("Detection Name", "")))),
        detection_category = tostring(column_ifexists("category", column_ifexists("Detection Category", ""))),
        entity_name        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_name", column_ifexists("Entity Name", ""))),
        entity_id          = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("entity_id", column_ifexists("Entity ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        entity_type        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_type", column_ifexists("Entity Type", ""))),
        investigation_status = tostring(column_ifexists("investigation_status", column_ifexists("Investigation Status", ""))),
        unresolved_priority  = tostring(column_ifexists("unresolved_priority", column_ifexists("Unresolved Priority", ""))),
        assigned_to        = tostring(column_ifexists("assignment_assigned_to_username", column_ifexists("Assigned To", ""))),
        external_reference = tostring(column_ifexists("external_reference_id", column_ifexists("External Reference ID", ""))),
        tags               = tostring(column_ifexists("tags", column_ifexists("Tags", ""))),
        reason             = tostring(column_ifexists("reason", column_ifexists("Reason", ""))),
        entity_url         = tostring(column_ifexists("url", column_ifexists("entity_url", column_ifexists("URL", "")))),
        detection_href     = tostring(column_ifexists("Vectra Pivot", column_ifexists("detection_href", "")))
,
        src_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("src_host_name",              column_ifexists("Source Host Name", ""))),
        src_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("src_account_name",           column_ifexists("Source Account Name", ""))),
        dst_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_host_name",              column_ifexists("Destination Host Name", ""))),
        dst_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_account_name",           column_ifexists("Destination Account Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_domain",          column_ifexists("Destination Domain Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_external = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_external_target", column_ifexists("Destination Domain External Target", ""))),
        summary             = tostring(column_ifexists("summary",                    column_ifexists("Summary", ""))),
        detail              = tostring(column_ifexists("detail",                     column_ifexists("Details", "")))
    | where not(DetectionFilterActive) or detection_id == p_DetectionId
    | where not(EntityFilterActive)    or entity_id == p_EntityId
};
VectraTimeline
| where change_type == "state"
| project TimeGenerated, change_type, detection_id, detection_name,
    detection_category, entity_name, entity_type, entity_id,
    investigation_status, unresolved_priority, assigned_to,
    external_reference, tags, reason,
    detection_href, entity_url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Close / State Changes — `change_type = state`

content.query:
let p_DetectionId = tostring("{DetectionId}");
let p_EntityId    = tostring("{EntityId}");
let DetectionFilterActive = p_DetectionId !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let EntityFilterActive    = p_EntityId    !in ("", "<unset>", "null");
let VectraTimeline = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where TimeGenerated between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end})
    | extend
        detection_id       = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("detection_id", column_ifexists("Detection ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        change_type        = tolower(tostring(column_ifexists("change_type", column_ifexists("Change Type", "")))),
        detection_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("d_type_vname", column_ifexists("detection_name", column_ifexists("Detection Name", "")))),
        detection_category = tostring(column_ifexists("category", column_ifexists("Detection Category", ""))),
        entity_name        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_name", column_ifexists("Entity Name", ""))),
        entity_id          = replace_regex(tostring(column_ifexists("entity_id", column_ifexists("Entity ID", ""))), @"\.0$", ""),
        entity_type        = tostring(column_ifexists("entity_type", column_ifexists("Entity Type", ""))),
        investigation_status = tostring(column_ifexists("investigation_status", column_ifexists("Investigation Status", ""))),
        unresolved_priority  = tostring(column_ifexists("unresolved_priority", column_ifexists("Unresolved Priority", ""))),
        assigned_to        = tostring(column_ifexists("assignment_assigned_to_username", column_ifexists("Assigned To", ""))),
        external_reference = tostring(column_ifexists("external_reference_id", column_ifexists("External Reference ID", ""))),
        tags               = tostring(column_ifexists("tags", column_ifexists("Tags", ""))),
        reason             = tostring(column_ifexists("reason", column_ifexists("Reason", ""))),
        entity_url         = tostring(column_ifexists("url", column_ifexists("entity_url", column_ifexists("URL", "")))),
        detection_href     = tostring(column_ifexists("Vectra Pivot", column_ifexists("detection_href", "")))
,

        src_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("src_account_name",           column_ifexists("Source Account Name", ""))),
        dst_host_name       = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_host_name",              column_ifexists("Destination Host Name", ""))),
        dst_account_name    = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_account_name",           column_ifexists("Destination Account Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_name     = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_domain",          column_ifexists("Destination Domain Name", ""))),
        dst_domain_external = tostring(column_ifexists("dst_domain_external_target", column_ifexists("Destination Domain External Target", ""))),
        summary             = tostring(column_ifexists("summary",                    column_ifexists("Summary", ""))),
        detail              = tostring(column_ifexists("detail",                     column_ifexists("Details", "")))
    | where not(DetectionFilterActive) or detection_id == p_DetectionId
    | where not(EntityFilterActive)    or entity_id == p_EntityId
};
VectraTimeline
| where change_type == "triage"
| project TimeGenerated, change_type, detection_id, detection_name,
